title: Fix admin panel routing error - 'search does not match any page'

requirements.text: Diagnose and fix the TanStack Router configuration issue causing the 'search does not match any page' error when navigating to /admin. Verify that the admin route is properly registered in the router configuration and that path matching works correctly for the /admin path.

quotes: your seach does not macth any page ese aata h

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin successfully loads the AdminDashboardPage without showing 'search does not match any page' error
The route definition in App.tsx correctly maps /admin to the AdminDashboardPage component
TanStack Router properly matches the /admin path and renders the protected admin route
Clicking the Admin Panel link in the Header successfully navigates to and displays the admin dashboard

requirements.text: Verify that the AdminRoute protection wrapper is not interfering with route matching and that it properly renders the AdminDashboardPage when authentication and authorization succeed.
acceptanceCriteria: AdminRoute component correctly wraps the admin dashboard route without breaking route matching
Authentication and admin role checks complete successfully before rendering the dashboard
The admin dashboard interface displays properly for authenticated admin users

requirements.text: Test the complete admin panel access flow end-to-end: log in as an admin user, navigate to /admin via the header link, verify the page loads without routing errors, and confirm all admin dashboard sections (Products, Orders, Users) are accessible.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin users can successfully navigate to /admin from the header link
The admin dashboard loads completely without any routing errors
All three management tabs (Products, Orders, Users) are clickable and display their respective interfaces
No 'search does not match any page' error appears during navigation

constraints: Do not modify the AdminRoute protection logic unless it is directly causing the routing issue
Preserve all existing admin dashboard functionality (Products, Orders, Users management)
Maintain the current authentication and authorization checks for admin access
nonGoals: Adding new admin features or functionality
Modifying the admin dashboard UI design
Changing the admin role assignment mechanism
